executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Run an ADMIN PANEL focused TestSprite test pass only. Use TESTSPRITE_PRD.md sections 9 through 16 as the PRD reference. Frontend: http://127.0.0.1:5173. Backend: http://localhost:8080. Admin credentials: admin@turnos.local / admin1234. Prioritize /admin/dashboard, /admin/services, /admin/professionals, /admin/business-hours, /admin/calendar, /admin/appointments, /admin/availability-blocks, and /admin/clients. Validate login, admin-only access, dashboard metrics/actions, service category CRUD, service CRUD and booking flags, professional CRUD and assignments, business hours CRUD, calendar availability and admin appointment creation, appointment filtering and state transitions, availability blocks, client CRUD/history/activation. Use only TS QA prefixed test data and do not modify real data if present. Because server is development mode, execute a stable high-priority subset if needed.
